'''bamozho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jocularity|jocularity]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-m-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jocularity|jocularity]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| bamozho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæmezheth|bæmezheth]] || [[word:bæmezhej|bæmezhej]] || [[word:bæmezhesh|bæmezhesh]] || [[word:bæmezhe|bæmezhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bamomozhoth|bamomozhoth]] || [[word:bamomozhoj|bamomozhoj]] || [[word:bamomozhosh|bamomozhosh]] || [[word:bamomozho|bamomozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bamozhoth|bamozhoth]] || [[word:bamozhoj|bamozhoj]] || [[word:bamozhosh|bamozhosh]] || [[word:bamozho|bamozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bamofzhofth|bamofzhofth]] || [[word:bamofzhofj|bamofzhofj]] || [[word:bamofzhofsh|bamofzhofsh]] || [[word:bamofzhof|bamofzhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bamozhotho|bamozhotho]] || [[word:bamozhojo|bamozhojo]] || [[word:bamozhosho|bamozhosho]] || [[word:bamozhoko|bamozhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bamozhoth|bamozhoth]] || [[word:bamozhoj|bamozhoj]] || [[word:bamozhosh|bamozhosh]] || [[word:bamozho|bamozho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bamozhothol|bamozhothol]] || [[word:bamozhojol|bamozhojol]] || [[word:bamozhoshol|bamozhoshol]] || [[word:bamozhokol|bamozhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bamozhoothotho|bamozhoothotho]] || [[word:bamozhoojojo|bamozhoojojo]] || [[word:bamozhooshosho|bamozhooshosho]] || [[word:bamozhooko|bamozhooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bamozhothon|bamozhothon]] || [[word:bamozhojon|bamozhojon]] || [[word:bamozhoshon|bamozhoshon]] || [[word:bamozhokon|bamozhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bamozhothooro|bamozhothooro]] || [[word:bamozhojooro|bamozhojooro]] || [[word:bamozhoshooro|bamozhoshooro]] || [[word:bamozhokooro|bamozhokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|307a66b}}
